title: George Mcclellan
compiled_truth: George Mcclellan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-25), George Mcclellan sent 28 and received 704 emails, totalling 732 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mike McConnell](people/mike-mcconnell) (14), [Stuart Staley](people/stuart-staley) (12), [A  Shankman](people/a-shankman) (12), [Kevin Mcgowan](people/kevin-mcgowan) (8), [Jeffrey Shankman](people/jeffrey-shankman) (7). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, deleted_items, inbox.
